author: @khylerbane4523
text:
Here are my thoughts on the new Snow White film; they are as follows… After watching the trailer, reading the comments section, and when the film finally releases…

Me after watching the trailer…
*”Every* wrong is recorded. Every slight against us… Page after page, etched in blood… Peter Dinklage, Modern Audience, Walt and Ron Disney, Bluth, *Zegler.*
The wokies must pay… Let. Them. Come.
There will be *no* alliance while *I’m* High King, *only* …a Reckoning!
March on, Brave Dawi. March On! To the cursed realms of Bluesky, this fettered realm, we go. 
Expect vengeance, a great wrong has befallen our kin. Innocent Clan Dwarfs butchered by -Didn’t Earn Its- DEIs. Attacking ethnic groups, stealing acting roles from Dwarfs, and destroying our children’s innocence. This fell deed has been entered into the Dammaz Kron, the cover slammed shut.  -Thronebearers- Commenters… Ready replies. Consumers…  ready wallets. For Karaz Ankor!”
-Thorgrim Grudgebearer, High King of the Dwarfs, Lord of the Karaz Ankor, Ruler of Karaz a-Karak, and keeper of the Dammaz Kron(Great Book of Grudges) 

Me seeing the comment section…
“At last, enough of this larking about, lads. It is time to arm ourselves, to act like slayers, and bring hurt feelings to the Woke! And especially those sniveling lefties! I wish to cleanse myself in battle. And once I have cleaned my soul of the subterfuge, then I will wear the honorable Cloak of Fyrskar again!
There is no time for speeches, the Woke cult gather before that Theme park. Their evil masters in the middle of some Valaya cursed ritual to the Leftist Gods. I see before me -the vampire- Zegler canting its’ filthy Umgi tweets. I want you to bring me the tears of the craven things, destroy the Woke filth before us, it will be a joy to spill the tears of the Wokemen before us. The Wokelord is a stain upon this world. You, consumers, I hear your wails and howls to be past this. For Grimnir, let us bring them no victory, let us bring Disney destitution!
Now, My Throng! …Ready the shield walls, bring the oath stones, let us dreng all before us! Charge for the oaths you made in Karak Kadrin, Charge for the honor all of Kadrin, Charge for your King, Charge for the Slayer Crown, Charge for Karaz Ankor, Charge! When the job is done, I will crack open a barrel of Bugmans ale and we will drink till none can stand!
Are you with me, Lads!?
-Ungrim Ironfist, lord of Slayers, king of Karak Kadrin, the Slayer King, Head of the Slayer Cult, killer of dragons, orks, elves, beasts, ratmen, undead, humans, mutants, and daemons… and (second) best/worst Dawi Slayer ever to exist. 

Me when the film releases…
“At LAST! Our goddess has spoken to me. She who prepares the hearth, who secured our holds. 
You know who I am… and I see you scum.
For I am a White Dwarf, and only a worthy folk can appear in *my* pages. This is a day to strike many grudges from the Great Book. So let us accord great deeds this day and give these wokie scum a right Royal Hammering! 
By my beard…! -Thaggoraki(Ratmen)- Disney filth… -Urki- woke scum… 
I would have words with you, Zegler! You *KNOW* Who I Am…Dinklage! Get Out of that CEO chair and get over here, Iger. By Vlaya’s cloak, I’ll have each and every one of you wokies back at Bluesky, Posting your meltdowns! Let’s Have Em! For Karaz Ankor!
•Grombrindol; the White Dwarf, -(Probably) Former High King and Elf friend Snorri Whitebeard- mysterious dwarf spirit, Chosen of Valaya, bane of Thaggoraki(Skaven) aka Ratmen, killer of beastmen, hater of Elves, wanderer of the Old World, Warrior of the Battles of Malis(the world that was), Settler of Grudges, hero and guardian of the Karaz Ankor.

Merry Christmas 2024 and Happy New Year 2025 everyone. May the Ancestor Gods watch over you. And may Durin the deathless and Aule be with you in life and beyond.

author: @mnirwin5112
text:
Her political comments ... hooboy. As with anybody else she is certainly welcome to her own opinions but "tone deaf" doesn't begin to describe her trumpeting them all over the internet. What's that saying: you are free to say what you like, but you are also free to take the consequences. I don't think she considered the latter would apply to her.

I think this film is going to crash and burn SO badly. She has certainly poured enough fuel on the fire but the whole rewrite of a beloved fairy tale didn't help. This is not *anybody's* Snow White. Those who grew up with the original are very unlikely to spend their money on it, and the "modern audiences" that it's supposedly written for ... well, let's just say we haven't seen them coming out in huge numbers to support other similar projects, so there's no reason to suppose they will support this one.

author: @sterlingjones1187
text:
Oh yes, this film will bomb harder than the Enola Gay. No, I'm not surprised by the immense dislike ratio the trailers have received on You Tube. Look, no one who has followed this disaster are morons. Disney is not blameless in fiasco, but NO ONE but a gun to Ms. Zegler's head and made her spew out that utter nonsense (actually, lets change that to 'gutter nonsense'). It would be one thing if Ms. Zegler had come out and had said (with ACTUAL humility) "I'm sorry for what I said. I spoke without thinking, etc." Instead, she doubled down repeatedly after those initial comments. Basically, she (with gusto) dumped two cans of gas onto the campfire and made it a raging bonfire that anyone can see from miles away. 

Mr. Casino, I can't wait to see how Disney will deal with this flaming money pit. As for Rachel Zeigler, she needs to go back to theater and stay there! Who's going to want deal with a walking, talking form of nitro glycerin that is a "money-repellant"? I also don't agree with the "she's young & opinionated" excuse. She's gone past beyond the shade of pale with that one.

Thank you Mr. Spielberg for unleashing this..."talent" onto the rest of the world. 😕

author: @RichardStone-l3z
text: I believe it is too late for Disney or Zegler to provide any corrective action for this film. The film has become a flash point for people who are disgusted with Disney's past actions. It is amazing that the Disney management allied this terrible situation to develop unchecked. One has to wonder if Zegler has a subconscious desire to fail since her actions are destroying her career in Hollywood, and it may already be beyond redemption.

author: @StephenBest-m1q
text:
Subjective maybe, but that song is no classic

Why does she shout ?

Why is the costume and cgi setting so bad ?

The acting (facial expressions) is poor

Who does the casting ? Her personality is that of the Evil Queen.  Her stature is more. akin to one of the seven, “Ghastly” ?

Zegler looks more like an Ugly Sister from Cinderella.   She is more suited to a film remake of Kubrick’s “Eyes Wide Apart”

The 'new' female stars either must be POC or gender neutral looking, like Morfydd Clark from Lord of the Rings, The Rings of Power' or Phoebe Waller-Bridge from 'Indiana Jones and the dial of Destiny', that's the 'look' they want, but nobody else does, lol.

author: @ronbutler3431
text: It's fun beating on Rachel Z. but let's not forget: The original Disney 'Snow White' story was replaced with a girl-boss / misandrist / 'Snow White: Warrior Queen' propaganda piece by the radical feminist screenwriters: Greta Gerwig and Erin Cressida Wilson.  A disastrous flop of a movie starts with a crap script, and Gerwig & Wilson supplied that, in spades.  I wish more attention was paid to their malign influence but I haven't found any interviews with them.  (Smart move on their part.)

text: I can't believe this thing hasn't even been released yet. It's hard to remember a time when it hasn't been a plague upon us.

author: @lawrencegoldworm
text: I think you're probably the smartest contributor to the WDW Pro podcast. However, I truly believe your channel would grow if you got a drastic hair/beard cut. Right now, it looks very ugly, unruly, and dirty. Please keep in mind that people take only a very few seconds, or even a quick glance, to make up their minds regarding the credibility of others. As it is now, the Culture Casino optics are more like Neanderthal Casino. People are also hardwired not to trust people whose faces are they cannot see. I mean this only as constructive criticism and hope it helps.

replies.text: Agreed, it's too much, I can understand going for the 'Gandalf' wise old man image, but not with a friggin baseball cap, lol.

author: @calvinferguson8588
text: New Disney is a Hollywood graveyard 🪦 . Disney Animation, Star Wars, Marvel, Pixar - all dead . Black Rock is The Undertaker .

author: @zrebbesh
text: I disrespect Disney. They've always mangled the stories they tell, but in the past it was at least  possible to tell which story they meant to be telling.  In the modern era, they're slapping the names of classic tales onto unrelated schlock.  Or just making up "Extruded Product" stories.

author: @localbandreview
text: She was a good fit for the hunger games prequel, not so much for this one. Disney did miscalculate a lot on this one, I dislike most of the live action remakes. Y2K was going to bomb no matter who was in it.

author: @infrasleep
text: Disney need to go to movie school so that they learn that if you want to do a retelling/re imagining you need to set the story in modern or future times. If they could do this superbly in the 50's ("Forbidden Planet" a re imagining of "The Tempest"/"West Side Story" used "Romeo and Juliet" set in 1950's youth/gang culture) why are Disney clueless how to do it 75 years on ?
